arts.ttl: Team News: Bournemouth vs. Manchester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's FA Cup clash between Bournemouth and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United make initial move for Bournemouth star – Talks held over €40m deal
arts.sum: Newcastle United have made an initial move for Bournemouth’s Dango Ouattara over a potential €40m move this summer. That’s according to Africa Foot, who report that Newcastle are ‘already making inroads’ ahead of the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Manchester United supporters group announce new protest against the Glazers following Man City derby
arts.sum: United fans protested against the Glazers on Saturday afternoon

arts.ttl: Lazio likely to miss out on Manchester City starlet Claudio Echeverri
arts.sum: Lazio look unlikely to secure Argentine youngster Claudio Echeverri despite reports linking the Manchester City starlet to the Biancocelesti circulating over the past few days.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer latest as £50m replacement 'keen' to join amid Kevin de Bruyne uncertainty

arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly join the race to sign Eintracht Frankfurt midfielder Hugo Larsson, who is attracting interest from Arsenal and Liverpool

arts.ttl: Manchester City enter race to sign Hugo Larsson
arts.sum: The race to sign Hugo Larsson (20) is hotting up with Manchester City joining fellow Premier League clubs pursuing the Eintracht Frankfurt midfielder, according to Sky Germany. Talks have already…

arts.ttl: We don't deserve Club World Cup bonus - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola does not believe his squad deserve any of the £97m prize money the club would pocket by winning the Club World Cup.

arts.ttl: Arsenal beware! €60m midfield target 'KEEN' on Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City have entered the race for Eintracht Frankfurt midfielder Hugo Larsson, according to German media. According to Sky Germany, Man City have now entered the race for Larsson and the player is said to be 'keen' on the reigning Premier League champions.

arts.ttl: When is the FA Cup semi-final draw? Ball numbers, start time and game dates as Man City wait
